mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE ARTICLE_NO > (SELECT MAX(ARTICLE_NO)-10 FROM TB_NOTICE) AND ARTICLE_NO <= (SELECT MAX(ARTICLE_NO) FROM TB_NOTICE) ORDER BY ARTICLE_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE VALUES ( TB_NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{articleTitle}, #{articleContent}, 0, sysdate, #{articleWriter} )
